sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n106421" key="u(drome/dousa" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ὑδρο-μέδουσα</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n106421.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">Water-queen,</tr_> name of a frog in <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1220.tlg001:19" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Batr.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">19</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
